# Mux

> Mux is a statically-typed, reference-counted programming language that combines
> Python's readability, Go's simplicity, and Rust's type safety, compiled to
> native code via LLVM. This file indexes the cross-repo knowledge hub for agents.

The Mux source lives across the muxlang org as independent repos. This `context`
repo owns the facts that span more than one repo.

## Architecture & design

- [Architecture / repo map](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): how the repos connect and how a .mux file becomes a binary
- [Value representation](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/value-representation.md): the unified Value enum, boxing, the three type representations
- [Memory model](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/memory.md): reference counting, RefHeader, scope-based cleanup
- [Monomorphization](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/monomorphization.md): compile-time generics
- [Object system](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/object-system.md): ObjectRef, type registry, static interface dispatch
- [Operators](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/operators.md): short-circuit lowering, operator overloading
- [Collections](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/collections.md): list/map/set, BTree rationale, nesting
- [Error handling](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/error-handling.md): result/optional layout
- [Modules](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/design/modules.md): import resolution, name mangling, module init

## Reference

- [Feature map](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/features.md): language/stdlib features to implementing modules
- [Glossary](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/glossary.md): cross-repo terminology
- [Release process](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/release-process.md): per-repo versioning and shipping
- [Repo governance](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/repo-governance.md): canonical labels, issue types, milestones, and Linear integration
- [Decisions](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-context/blob/main/docs/decisions/README.md): architecture decision records

## Repos

- [mux-compiler](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-compiler): compiler + CLI (lexer, parser, semantics, LLVM codegen); the canonical Mux version
- [mux-runtime](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-runtime): runtime + stdlib for compiled programs; plain Rust, no LLVM; on crates.io
- [mux-website](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-website): docs site (mux-lang.dev) + docs AI assistant
- [mux-website-api](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-website-api): Fly.io compile/run API behind the playground
- [tree-sitter-mux](https://github.com/muxlang/tree-sitter-mux): tree-sitter grammar + highlight queries
- [mux-syntax-highlighting](https://github.com/muxlang/mux-syntax-highlighting): TextMate grammar, VSCode extension, canonical syntax spec

## Docs

- [Language reference and guides](https://mux-lang.dev): the user-facing documentation
